title: Pandavs Pipeline Hourly Report
description: Schema for the canonical hourly operational report emitted by the Pandavs scan pipeline. One document per hour, filename: reports/hourly_<YYYYMMDDTHH>.json. All counters are monotonically non-decreasing across consecutive reports. Source: scan_persistence.db via MON-11 composite query.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Increment minor on additive field addition, major on breaking change.

report_ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which this report was generated (report emission time, not window end).

report_window_start_ts.description: Start of the 1-hour window this report covers. Typically report_ts minus 1 hour, truncated to the hour.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this report instance. Format: hourly_<YYYYMMDDTHH>. Matches filename without extension.

chunks.description: Chunk queue progress counters. Source table: chunk_queue (WO-00022 schema). All totals are cumulative from pipeline start.

completed.description: Number of chunk_queue rows with status=COMPLETED. Monotonically non-decreasing. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED'.

total.description: Fixed denominator. Pandavs Day 1 pipeline has exactly 51 DNS chunks from dnsx_queue.txt.

coverage_pct.description: Percentage of chunks completed: ROUND(completed * 100.0 / 51, 2). Monotonically non-decreasing. SQL: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / 51, 2) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED'.

pending.description: Count of chunks with status=PENDING (not yet started or returned from FAILED). SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='PENDING'.

leased.description: Count of chunks currently LEASED by active workers. Nonzero means pipeline is actively processing. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='LEASED'.

failed.description: Count of chunks in FAILED state (eligible for retry). SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='FAILED'.

dead_letter.description: Count of chunks in FAILED_PERMANENT (max retries exhausted). Requires operator review. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='FAILED_PERMANENT'.

last_chunk_completed_ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recently completed chunk. NULL if no chunks completed yet. Used for no-progress detection (ALT-01). SQL: SELECT MAX(completed_at) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED'.

rate_per_h.description: Chunks completed in the last 60 minutes. Used as the rolling rate for ETA. NULL if cannot be computed. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk_queue WHERE status='COMPLETED' AND completed_at >= datetime('now','-1 hour').

eta_h.description: Estimated hours until all 51 chunks complete, computed as (51 - completed) / rate_per_h. NULL if rate_per_h = 0 or pipeline not started. Rounded to 2 decimal places.

persistence.description: SQLite persistence counters. Sources: events table (total events) and ingest_runs table (error counts).

events_total.description: Total distinct events in the events table. Monotonically non-decreasing. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events.

ingest_errors_last_h.description: Sum of errors column across ingest_runs started in the last 1 hour. Used for ALT-02 threshold. SQL: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(errors), 0) FROM ingest_runs WHERE started_ts >= datetime('now','-1 hour').

files_registered.description: Total files tracked in the files table (result files registered for ingestion). SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM files.

sink.description: Sink delivery counters. Sources: event_sync_ledger (confirmed deliveries), sink_outbox (delivery queue state), dead_letter_events (failed events requiring review). All added by WO-00023 schema migration.

clickhouse_synced.description: Total events confirmed delivered to ClickHouse. Monotonically non-decreasing. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_sync_ledger WHERE sink_target='clickhouse'.

neo4j_synced.description: Total events confirmed delivered to Neo4j. Monotonically non-decreasing. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_sync_ledger WHERE sink_target='neo4j'.

outbox_pending.description: Events in sink_outbox awaiting delivery or retry (status IN ('PENDING','FAILED')). SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED').

outbox_failed.description: Events in sink_outbox with status=FAILED (eligible for retry, retry_count < max_retries). Subset of outbox_pending. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE status='FAILED'.

outbox_dead_letter.description: Events in sink_outbox with status=DEAD_LETTER (max retries exhausted, moved to dead_letter_events). SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sink_outbox WHERE status='DEAD_LETTER'.

sink_lag_h.description: Age in hours of the oldest PENDING or FAILED outbox entry. NULL if outbox is clear. SLO: < 2.0h. Feeds ALT-04. SQL: SELECT ROUND((julianday('now') - julianday(MIN(created_at)))*24.0, 2) FROM sink_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING','FAILED').

dlq_unreviewed.description: Dead letter events with reviewed_at IS NULL. Any value > 0 triggers ALT-03 immediately. SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dead_letter_events WHERE reviewed_at IS NULL.

alerts_active.description: List of alert IDs currently in firing state at time of report emission. Empty array = healthy.

blockers.description: Human-readable strings describing known blockers. Empty array if none. Directly from PHASE_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md Reporting Format 'blockers (if any)' field.
examples: ClickHouse unreachable since 2026-03-04T10:00Z — WO-00023 DLQ accumulating

source_queries.description: Optional: record of SQL query identifiers used to populate this report for auditability.
